gold_sql: SELECT T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T2.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE, AVG(T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS), COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, T2.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T1.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dhs.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY, 
    dhs.SOCIAL_NETWORK_CONTACT_2_TYPE, 
    AVG(fhc.MONTHLY_TOTAL_CONSUMPTION_EXPENDITURE_RS) AS avg_monthly_consumption, 
    COUNT(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID) AS total_households
FROM 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL dhs
JOIN 
    DIM_HOUSEHOLD dh ON dhs.HOUSEHOLD_ID = dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID

    FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION fhc ON dh.HOUSEHOLD_ID = fhc.HOUSEHOLD_ID

ముస్లిం సామాజిక వర్గానికి చెందిన లేదా వ్యాపార కార్యకలాప ఉపవర్గం 40లో పాల్గొన్న అన్ని గృహాలను గుర్తించండి, వాటి ID ప్రకారం క్రమబద్ధీకరించబడినవి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_SOCIAL AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN DIM_LIVELIHOOD_INCOME AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CASTE_RELIGION_GROUP_8_CATEGORY = 'Muslim' OR T3.BUSINESS_1_ACTIVITY_SUBTYPE = '40' ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT h.household_id FROM dim_household h 
JOIN dim_household_social hs ON h.household_id = hs.household_id 
JOIN dim_livelihood_income li ON h.household_id = li.household_id 
WHERE hs.caste_religion_group_8_category ILIKE 'Muslim' OR li.business_1_activity_subtype = 40 
ORDER BY h.household_id;
raw_output:
SELECT h.household_id FROM dim_household h 
JOIN dim_household_social hs ON h.household_id = hs.household_id 
JOIN dim_livelihood_income li ON h.household_id = li.household_id 
WHERE hs.caste_religion_group_8_category ILIKE 'Muslim' OR li.business_1_activity_subtype = 40 
ORDER BY h.household_id;

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
మహారాష్ట్ర రాష్ట్రంలోని గ్రామీణ ప్రాంతాల్లోని గృహ ఐడీలు మరియు వారి నెలవారీ ఆహారేతర ఖర్చులను జాబితా చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.STATE = 'Maharashtra' AND T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural'
predicted_sql:
SELECT t1.household_id, t2.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs 
FROM dim_household AS t1 
JOIN fact_household_consumption AS t2 
ON t1.household_id = t2.household_id 
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy AS t3 
ON t2.geography_id = t3.geography_id 
WHERE t3.state ILIKE 'maharashtra' AND t3.census_2001_urban_rural ILIKE 'rural';
raw_output:
SELECT t1.household_id, t2.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs 
FROM dim_household AS t1 
JOIN fact_household_consumption AS t2 
ON t1.household_id = t2.household_id 
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy AS t3 
ON t2.geography_id = t3.geography_id 
WHERE t3.state ILIKE 'maharashtra' AND t3.census_2001_urban_rural ILIKE 'rural';

    dhs.caste_religion_group_8_category, 
    AVG(dli.household_total_income) AS avg_household_income, 
    SUM(dli.household_total_income) AS total_household_income, 
    AVG(dh.household_number_of_animal_care_workers) AS avg_animal_care_workers

    dim_household_social dhs
JOIN 
    dim_household dh ON dhs.household_id = dh.household_id

    dim_livelihood_income dli ON dh.household_id = dli.household_id

gold_sql: SELECT T2.STATE, AVG(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD AS T3 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.STATE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T1.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql: SELECT state, AVG(monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) AS average_non_food_expenditure FROM fact_household_consumption AS f JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy AS g ON f.geography_id = g.geography_id WHERE g.census_2001_urban_rural = 'Rural' GROUP BY state ORDER BY average_non_food_expenditure DESC;

question:
ఈ ప్రశ్నను తెలుగులో అనువదించండి:
ప్రతి జిల్లా మరియు రాష్ట్రానికి సగటు నెలవారీ తలసరి వినియోగాన్ని లెక్కించండి, గ్రామీణ ఆరోగ్య సౌకర్యాలు ఉన్న ప్రాంతాలపై మాత్రమే దృష్టి పెట్టండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T3.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR = '1' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.DISTRICT_CODE
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dg.state, 
    dg.district_code, 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita
FROM 
    fact_household_consumption fhc
JOIN 
    dim_geography_hierarchy dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dg.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
WHERE 
    dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator = 1
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.district_code
ORDER BY 
    average_monthly_consumption_per_capita DESC;
raw_output:

    dg.state, 
    dg.district_code, 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS average_monthly_consumption_per_capita
FROM 
    fact_household_consumption fhc
JOIN 
    dim_geography_hierarchy dg ON fhc.geography_id = dg.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dg.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
WHERE 
    dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator = 1
GROUP BY 
    dg.state, 
    dg.district_code
ORDER BY 
    average_monthly_consumption_per_capita DESC;

question: రాష్ట్రం మరియు ఆరోగ్య సౌకర్యాల లభ్యత ప్రకారం సగటు నెలవారీ తలసరి వినియోగం మరియు మొత్తం ఆహారేతర ఖర్చుల వివరణను అందించండి, ఇక్కడ సగటు వినియోగం 329ని మించిన ప్రాంతాలపై మాత్రమే దృష్టి పెట్టి, ఫలితాలను మొత్తం ఖర్చు ప్రకారం ర్యాంక్ చేయండి.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T2.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR, AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), SUM(T3.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_VILLAGE_INFRASTRUCTURE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CONSUMPTION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T2.VILLAGE_HEALTH_FACILITY_AVAILABLE_INDICATOR HAVING AVG(T3.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) > 329 ORDER BY SUM(T3.MONTHLY_NON_FOOD_EXPENDITURE_RS) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dh.state, 
    dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator, 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption, 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_non_food_expenditure_rs) AS avg_monthly_non_food_expenditure
FROM 
    fact_household_consumption fhc
JOIN 
    dim_geography_hierarchy dh ON fhc.geography_id = dh.geography_id
JOIN 
    dim_village_infrastructure dvi ON dh.geography_id = dvi.geography_id
WHERE 
    fhc.monthly_consumption_per_capita > 329
GROUP BY 
    dh.state, 
    dvi.village_health_facility_available_indicator
ORDER BY 
    AVG(fhc.monthly_total_consumption_expenditure_rs) DESC;
